sources.title: Turist Ömer Yamyamlar Arasında, Turkish Movie
sources.description: Turist Ömer Yamyamlar Arasında, Turkish Movie

metadata.Plot: 2 group people trying to seize the valuable mandate eye and fighting each other for it. Omer the Tourist who is unaware of the world, planning to tattoo the treasury plans on his arms an indigenous tribal chief who wants to find the treasure, took Tourist Omar to sets up their plans to go to Africa, but in the meantime the thing they don't know is the treasure hunters is after Tourist Omer.
metadata.Actors: Özdemir Akin, Sadri Alisik, Aziz Basmaci
